reasoning: To cross the right arm over the chest, I need to rotate the right arm inward using Joint1 and pitch it upward with Joint2, while rotating the wrist inward to create the crossing effect. For the left arm to remain resting, I rotate it slightly outward with Joint1 and pitch it downward using Joint2 to simulate a relaxed posture. This position can express contemplation, defensiveness, or hesitation and can be used for emojis like 🤔 or 🤨.
